name: Tidewise Acquisition Corp
business: Tidewise Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target.

exposures.sentence: However, we intend to primarily focus on target businesses operating in industries with high-growth potential globally, including but not limited to high technology, artificial intelligence, intelligent manufacturing and innovative pharmaceuticals and biotechnology.

catalysts.sentence: We intend to apply to list our units on The Nasdaq Capital Market (Nasdaq) under the symbol TEACU on or promptly after the date of this prospectus.

catalysts.event: Separate trading of ordinary shares and rights
catalysts.sentence: The ordinary shares and rights constituting the units will begin separate trading on the 52nd day following the date of this prospectus (or, if such date is not a business day, the following business day) unless Blue Diamond Securities of America LLC (Blue Diamond or the Representative) informs us of its decision to allow earlier separate trading.
